hero.sub_1: Premium AC Sleeper tours from Ahmedabad.
hero.sub_2: Designed exclusively for families and senior citizens.

trust.desc: Gujarat's most trusted travel partner for senior citizens and families. Experience hospitality that feels like home.
trust.feat_1_desc: Brand new AC coaches with charging points, clean blankets, and air suspension for maximum comfort.
trust.feat_2_desc: We travel with our own Maharaj (Cook). Enjoy piping hot Thepla, Gathiya, and Shaak even in the mountains.
trust.feat_3_desc: Our tour managers are trained to assist elderly passengers at every step. We are patient, caring, and attentive.

footer.desc: Connecting souls to the divine since 2010. We are a government registered tour operator based in Ahmedabad.
footer.news_msg: Subscribe to get special discount on Chardham Yatra.
